sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n94167" key="silfio/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σιλφι-όω</orth>, <sense id="n94167.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">prepare with silphium</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σεσιλφιωμένος</foreign>,= sq., <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1601.tlg001:2:31" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philox.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.31</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
